steps.title: Spot the life-stage signal
steps.content: The narrator says she was never so aware of entering a new stage as when she crossed the threshold of the unfurnished apartment. That moment separates a complicated past from an open future.

steps.title: Name the major transition
steps.content: The matching choice states that the narrator recognizes a particular moment as a major shift in her life. Choice A invents a business, Choice B contradicts her saying she was often unprepared, and Choice D invents gratitude. The answer is C.
